title: QT CRITICAL: dispatch_state.json phase matrix contaminated — 21 phantom PASS rows for QM5_1003_v1_P2
description: QT finding: D:/QM/reports/pipeline/dispatch_state.json QM5_1003_v1_P2 bucket shows 36/36 PASS and phase_verdict=PASS — but 21 of those rows are definitively phantom (from the invalidated 2026-05-01 zero-trade run). Smoking gun: GDAXI.DWX and NDX.DWX appear as PASS rows — these non-canonical names were used in the phantom run only. The clean P2 dispatch (P2_clean_20260505_*) cannot produce a trustworthy phase_verdict until the phantom rows are cleared. See first comment for full analysis. Pipeline-Op must reset QM5_1003_v1_P2 matrix in dispatch_state.json before accepting P2 phase_verdict=PASS as genuine.

ancestors.title: QUA-660 D1 — QM5_1003 P0..P10 baseline (first V5 report.csv)
ancestors.description:
# QUA-660 D1 — QM5_1003 P0..P10 baseline (the unblocking artifact)

**Parent:** QUA-660 (Phase 3 ignition).
**Owner:** Pipeline-Operator (`46fc11e5-...`).
**Blocked by:** QUA-661 (D2 Strategy Card backfill — SRC01_S03 must be on disk + CEO G0-confirmed before P0). Do NOT start P0 until D2 closes for SRC01_S03.
**Authority:** DL-029, DL-035 (load-balancing), DL-036 (EA Review Gate at P0), DL-038 (seven binding backtest rules), DL-046 (V5 deliverable order), DL-050 (perpetual cadence — D1 is the active EA slot).

## Goal

First end-to-end V5 backtest report on `QM5_1003` (Davey baseline 3-bar, SRC01_S03, ea_id 1003). Cycle ships within 48h of D2 close.

PASS or FAIL is acceptable. What matters is the cycle completes and produces a real verdict.

## Deliverables

### Phase walk (P0..P10)

1. **P0 — Compile validate** (per `processes/05-ea-build.md` if present, else 01-ea-lifecycle.md). CTO (`241ccf3c-...`) review at this gate per DL-036 EA Review Gate. Pipeline-Op may NOT start P1 without CTO sign-off.
2. **P1 — Smoke on T1**. Adapt `framework/scripts/run_backtest_smoke.ps1` pattern to QM5_1003's set file. Confirm against `framework/tests/smoke/expected_events.json`.
3. **P2 — Single-symbol baseline backtest**. Model 4 every-real-tick on EURUSD.DWX H1 (or whatever Strategy Card SRC01_S03 dictates — confirm against the card from D2).
4. **P3..P8 — Quality-Tech runs** (`c1f90ba8-...`):
   - P3.5 CSR (`framework/scripts/p35_csr_runner.py`)
   - P5 Calibrated noise stress (`p5_calibrated_noise_runner.py` + `p5_stress_runner.py` + `p5b_calibrated_noise.py` + `p5c_crisis_slices.py`)
   - P6 Multi-seed (`p6_multiseed.py`)
   - P7 Stat validation (`p7_stat_validation_runner.py` + `p7_statval.py`)
   - P8 News impact (`p8_news_impact.py`)
5. **P9 — Latency stress**. Pipeline-Op-owned. Use existing P9 scaffold or VPS_SLIPPAGE_LATENCY_CALIBRATION_V2.json (calibrate first if missing per `PIPELINE_V5_SUB_GATE_SPEC.md` § P5).
6. **P10 — KS-test stability**. Quality-Tech-owned.
7. **G1 — CEO verdict** at end.

### Output artifacts

- **Report**: `D:\QM
eports\QM5_1003\baseline_2026-05-XX
eport.csv` with per-phase PASS/FAIL + evidence sub-folder per gate.
- **ADR**: `decisions/2026-05-XX_qm5_1003_baseline.md` with G1 verdict (PASS or FAIL — both acceptable).
- **Lessons-learned**: at least one entry in `lessons-learned/` from the cycle. PASS or FAIL, learnings are real because the cycle is real.

### If FAIL

- Author lessons-learned.
- Mark EA failed in `framework/registry/ea_id_registry.csv`.
- Pipeline-Op moves directly to D4 next EA in the same heartbeat (DL-050 cadence — slot stays full).

A FAIL is **not** a failure of this directive. It's a successful pipeline execution that produced a real verdict.

## Step 25 CONDITIONAL gate

Per QUA-660 boundaries: D1 launches once today's smoke run on T1 PASSes against `expected_events.json`. If smoke FAILs, Pipeline-Op fixes the condition first; do NOT run baseline against broken framework. Smoke status as of issue creation: TBD by Pipeline-Op heartbeat — confirm before P2.

## Boundaries

- T6 isolation — D1 runs T1 only (or T1-T5 per DL-035 / DL-038 36-symbol matrix if Strategy Card calls for it). T6 is OFF LIMITS.
- DL-038 Rule 5: EA on all 5 terminals (only if matrix scope warrants — confirm with Strategy Card scope).
- DL-038 Rule 7: `RISK_FIXED` set-file mandatory per dispatch.
- QT FAIL is binding — CEO cannot override into PASS.
- No data-snooping shortcuts — Strategy Card from D2 is the spec; if implementation diverges, surface to CEO before backfill.

## Acceptance

- `report.csv` exists on disk at the path above.
- ADR with G1 verdict committed to `main`.
- This issue closed with commit hash + report path + verdict cite.
- Next EA from D4 starts P0 in the same heartbeat (DL-050).

## Critical path

D2 (SRC01_S03 card on disk) → D1 P0 (CTO review) → P1 smoke → P2 baseline → P3..P10 (QT) → G1 verdict → D4 next EA starts.

## Pacing

48h from D2 close to G1 verdict. If a phase blocks longer than 12h, file a Class-2 escalation comment naming the unblock owner per `processes/12-board-escalation.md`.

project.name: Portfolio Factory V5
project.description: Single project containing the entire V5 build: source research → strategy cards → EA  build → backtest baseline → quality review → T6 demo → DXZ live burn-in → portfolio expansion. Public via website + YouTube + newsletter.

goal.title: Build-in-public quant research factory; portfolio of mechanical trading strategies
goal.description: Build-in-public quant research factory; portfolio of mechanical trading strategies. 12-month mission: ship a portfolio of low-volume, high-quality mechanical EAs trading independent edges across FX, indices, energy, and crypto, hosted on the QuantMechanica VPS factory (T1-T5) with T6 reserved for live deploy. Public artefacts (Strategy Cards, decision log, episode pack) ship under the QuantMechanica brand.

ancestors.title: Phase 3 ignition: first baseline report.csv on QM5_1003, then perpetual pipeline cadence
ancestors.description:
Anchor: today's diagnosis after QUA-639 close — the company has spent 6 days building the pipeline. Zero

  strategy report.csv files exist. This issue turns the pipeline from "built" to "running."



  Filed by: Board Advisor at OWNER direction.



  Goal



  Produce the first end-to-end V5 backtest report within 48h, on QM5\_1003 (Davey baseline 3-bar, SRC01\_S03,

  ea\_id 1003 active per commit 54c26feb). Then establish a structural rule that the pipeline never idles —

  at any moment, ≥1 EA is in P0..P10 and ≥1 strategy card is in extraction.



  Deliverables



  D1 — QM5\_1003 P0..P10 baseline (the unblocking artifact, 48h)



  Pipeline-Operator (46fc11e5-...) runs the full pipeline on QM5\_1003:



  \- P0 compile validate (CTO code review at this gate per processes/05-ea-build.md).

  \- P1 smoke on T1 (uses framework/scripts/run\_backtest\_smoke.ps1 pattern adapted to 1003's set file).

  \- P2 single-symbol baseline backtest, Model 4 every real tick, on EURUSD.DWX H1 (or whatever Strategy Card

   SRC01\_S03 dictates).

  \- P3..P8 Quality-Tech runs CSR, calibrated noise stress, multi-seed, stat-validation, news impact via the

  existing scaffolds (framework/scripts/p35\_csr\_runner.py, p5\_calibrated\_noise\_runner.py, p6\_multiseed.py,

  p7\_stat\_validation\_runner.py, p8\_news\_impact.py).

  \- P9 latency stress (Pipeline-Operator).

  \- P10 KS-test stability (Quality-Tech).

  \- G1 verdict by CEO.



  Output: D:\QM
eports\QM5\_1003\baseline\_2026-05-02
eport.csv with per-phase PASS / FAIL + evidence

  sub-folder per gate. ADR decisions/2026-05-XX\_qm5\_1003\_baseline.md with the G1 verdict (whether PASS or

  FAIL is fine — what matters is the cycle completed).



  If FAIL: lessons-learned authored, EA marked failed in framework/registry/ea\_id\_registry.csv,

  Pipeline-Operator moves directly to D4 next EA. A FAIL is not a failure of this directive — it's a

  successful pipeline execution that produced a real verdict.



  D2 — Strategy Card audit + backfill



  strategy\_cards/ folder does not currently exist at repo root. EAs reference cards (// Strategy Card:

  SRC01\_S03 (davey-baseline-3bar), CEO G0 APPROVED 2026-04-27) but the cards themselves are not on disk in

  the canonical location.



  \- Research locates or authors strategy\_cards/SRC01\_S03\_davey\_baseline\_3bar.md (and SRC01\_S04, SRC04\_S03

  while at it). Card format per processes/04-strategy-card-extraction.md.

  \- CEO confirms or backfills G0 verdict against the written card. If the prior G0 verdict was made without

  a card on disk, the backfill DL says so explicitly.

  \- Without this, P-Op cannot validate EA-vs-card and QT cannot audit data-snooping.



  D3 — Perpetual pipeline cadence rule (DL entry)



  Structural rule, not a one-shot:



  ▎ At any time during Phase 3+, the company maintains ≥1 EA in active P0..P10 (Pipeline-Operator +

  ▎ Quality-Tech) and ≥1 strategy card in active extraction (Research). If both queues empty, that's a

  ▎ Class-2 escalation per processes/12-board-escalation.md — CEO must dispatch within the next heartbeat.



  DL entry: decisions/2026-05-XX\_phase3\_perpetual\_cadence.md. Update paperclip/agents/wave\_plan.md to

  reflect that idle Pipeline-Operator + idle Research \= escalation, not normal state.



  This is the rule that prevents the "back to gate-building" drift after Phase 3 Cycle 1 closes.



  D4 — Queue the next 3 EAs behind QM5\_1003



  So Pipeline-Operator never idles after D1 closes:



  \- QM5\_1004 davey-es-breakout (SRC01\_S04) — .ex5 exists, ready for P0.

  \- QM5\_SRC04\_S03\_lien\_fade\_double\_zeros — .mq5 landed in commit ec81a1d8; needs ea\_id assignment + compile.

  \- QM5\_1017 cointegration scaffold (SRC02\_S01, started in 39a75203) — finish coding + compile.



  Acceptance: each has a documented next-action in PROJECT\_BACKLOG.md Phase 3 section, in priority order.

  When P-Op finishes 1003, the next EA is already queued and unblocked.



  D5 — Research backlog (so the upstream never empties)



  Research (7aef7a17-...) commits to landing 2 new Strategy Cards in the next 7 days from approved sources.

  Card pipeline keeps building so D3's "≥1 card in extraction" rule has supply.



  Boundaries



  \- Charter values, hard rules, T6 isolation — unchanged.

  \- Step 25 CONDITIONAL conditions — D1 launches once today's smoke run on T1 PASSes against

  expected\_events.json. If smoke FAILs, fix the condition first; do not run baseline against broken

  framework.

  \- Quality gates — QT and QB sign-offs are not optional. CEO cannot override a QT FAIL into a PASS; that's

  charter (paperclip/governance/company\_card.md).

  \- T6 — out of scope for this directive. Phase 4 (T6 demo) only after first PASS verdict.

  \- Issue inflation — D1..D5 ship as deliverables of this single issue, not as five separate issues.



  Critical path



  D2 (card audit) ──► D1 (P0..P10 on 1003) ──► G1 verdict ──► next EA from D4 starts

                                            └─► report.csv exists

                                            └─► first lessons-learned from a real cycle

  D3 (cadence DL) — files in parallel, governs all subsequent cycles.

  D5 (research backlog) — parallel, keeps upstream full.



  D1 is the artifact that proves V5 produces backtest evidence. D3 is the rule that prevents reverting to

  gate-building once D1 closes. Everything else feeds those two.
